columns.description: Stable digest of one exact provider, market, locale, ticker, and observed Composite FIGI review group. It is not an adjudication or canonical asset ID.
columns.name: review_group_id

columns.description: Content-addressed ID of the frozen three-group full-S4-release scope.
columns.name: review_scope_set_id

columns.description: Exact source provider namespace, fixed to massive.
columns.name: provider_id

columns.description: Exact source provider market, fixed to stocks.
columns.name: provider_market

columns.description: Exact source provider locale, fixed to us without normalization.
columns.name: provider_locale

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker: SOR, XZO, or ANABV.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: Exact provider-observed Composite FIGI used by the bounded group filter. It is observed lineage, never a canonical target.
columns.name: exact_group_observed_composite_figi

columns.description: Exact full-history S4 release-set ID bound by the future candidate.
columns.name: s4_release_set_id

columns.description: Exact Composite-inventory completion ID used to select the reviewed conflict facts.
columns.name: inventory_completion_id

columns.description: Exact directional raw-preview candidate ID that established the sampled direction requiring this review.
columns.name: directional_preview_candidate_id

columns.description: Exact directional raw-preview completion ID that fixed the prior awaiting-review result.
columns.name: directional_preview_completion_id

columns.description: XNYS session with at least one exact-group asset_observation_daily row. Sessions without exact-group Asset evidence are not synthesized.
columns.name: session_date

columns.description: Previous observed session in this review group; null only for the first observed session. This is not an override boundary.
columns.name: previous_observed_session

columns.description: Whether the previous observed session is the immediately preceding frozen XNYS session; null only for the first observation.
columns.name: previous_observed_session_is_adjacent_xnys

columns.description: Stable evidence-only ID for one maximal XNYS-adjacent run of exact-group observations. It is not a registry interval ID.
columns.name: exact_observed_run_id

columns.description: Zero-based run ordinal within the review group, ordered by observed session.
columns.name: exact_observed_run_ordinal

columns.description: Zero-based session ordinal within the exact observed run.
columns.name: observed_session_ordinal_in_run

columns.description: First actually observed session in this exact observed run; never extrapolated backward.
columns.name: exact_observed_run_start_session

columns.description: Last actually observed session in this exact observed run; never extrapolated forward.
columns.name: exact_observed_run_end_session

columns.description: Count of observed XNYS sessions in this exact observed run.
columns.name: exact_observed_run_session_count

columns.description: First session in the full release containing exact-group Asset evidence.
columns.name: group_first_observed_session

columns.description: Last session in the full release containing exact-group Asset evidence.
columns.name: group_last_observed_session

columns.description: Total distinct observed sessions for the review group in the full S4 release.
columns.name: group_observed_session_count

columns.description: Total maximal XNYS-adjacent exact observed runs for the review group.
columns.name: group_exact_observed_run_count

columns.description: Count of every Asset source version matching the exact group on this session; it must be positive.
columns.name: exact_asset_observation_match_count

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of every matching Asset ProviderRowAttestation v2 ID in deterministic physical order, without version selection or deduplication.
columns.name: exact_asset_observation_attestation_ids_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of distinct observed Share Class FIGI values, including null when observed, across all exact-group versions. Share Class never filters input.
columns.name: exact_group_observed_share_class_figis_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of distinct observed CIK values, including null when observed, across all exact-group versions.
columns.name: exact_group_observed_ciks_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of distinct observed primary exchange MIC values, including null when observed, across all exact-group versions.
columns.name: exact_group_observed_primary_exchange_mics_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of distinct observed type codes, including null when observed, across all exact-group versions.
columns.name: exact_group_observed_type_codes_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of distinct provider_active values across every exact-group Asset version for this session.
columns.name: exact_group_provider_active_values_json

columns.description: Count of exact-group Asset versions not selected by the same-session universe parent. They remain fully attested.
columns.name: nonselected_exact_group_asset_observation_count

columns.description: Count of additional distinct Share Class, CIK, MIC, type, or active projections among same-session exact-group versions.
columns.name: same_session_exact_group_identity_variant_count

columns.description: Count of exact same-ticker/session universe_source_daily rows, constrained to zero or one and never filtered by Composite or Share Class.
columns.name: universe_membership_count

columns.description: Exact derived domain present_active, present_inactive, or absent_source_membership. Identity quality cannot change membership.
columns.name: membership_status

columns.description: Exact universe active_on_date when membership exists; null when source membership is absent. It is not final tradability.
columns.name: active_on_date

columns.description: ProviderRowAttestation v2 ID for the exact universe row; null only when membership is absent.
columns.name: universe_row_attestation_id

columns.description: Exact selected_source_record_id from the universe row; null only when membership is absent.
columns.name: selected_source_record_id

columns.description: Exact universe source_version_count; null only when membership is absent.
columns.name: source_version_count

columns.description: Exact universe version_group_id; nullable for singleton or absent membership.
columns.name: version_group_id

columns.description: Exact universe selection_status; null only when membership is absent.
columns.name: selection_status

columns.description: Count of all same-ticker/session Asset rows whose source_record_id equals selected_source_record_id; one when membership exists, zero otherwise.
columns.name: selected_parent_asset_match_count

columns.description: ProviderRowAttestation v2 ID of the selected Asset parent, even when that parent has another Composite; null only for absent membership.
columns.name: selected_parent_attestation_id

columns.description: True only when the selected Asset parent exactly reproduces the frozen S4 universe projection; null for absent membership.
columns.name: selected_parent_projection_match

columns.description: Whether the selected Asset parent is one of this session's exact-group versions; null for absent membership. False remains review evidence.
columns.name: selected_parent_matches_exact_group

columns.description: Exact observed Composite FIGI on the selected Asset parent; nullable source value or absent membership is preserved.
columns.name: selected_parent_observed_composite_figi

columns.description: Exact observed Share Class FIGI on the selected Asset parent; nullable source value or absent membership is preserved.
columns.name: selected_parent_observed_share_class_figi

columns.description: Exact observed CIK on the selected Asset parent; nullable source value or absent membership is preserved.
columns.name: selected_parent_observed_cik

columns.description: Exact observed primary exchange MIC on the selected Asset parent; nullable source value or absent membership is preserved.
columns.name: selected_parent_observed_primary_exchange_mic

columns.description: Exact observed type code on the selected Asset parent; nullable source value or absent membership is preserved.
columns.name: selected_parent_observed_type_code

columns.description: Exact source_available_session on the selected Asset parent; null only for absent membership and never replaced by universe availability.
columns.name: selected_parent_source_available_session

columns.description: Content-addressed ID of the immutable per-group manifest retaining all exact-group Asset attestations and every used universe/parent attestation.
columns.name: exact_group_evidence_manifest_id

columns.description: Normalized relative path to the immutable exact-group evidence manifest.
columns.name: exact_group_evidence_manifest_path

columns.description: Lowercase SHA-256 of the exact evidence manifest bytes.
columns.name: exact_group_evidence_manifest_sha256

columns.description: Fixed exact_full_release_observed_runs_only. Observed run endpoints are facts and never become effective override boundaries.
columns.name: observed_interval_state

columns.description: Fixed not_evaluated. No identity, cross-market, provider-Composite, Share Class, or transition registry is loaded.
columns.name: registry_evaluation_state

columns.description: Always false. Observed history is not an adjudication plan.
columns.name: adjudication_eligible

columns.description: Always false. Observed history cannot create canonical identity.
columns.name: canonical_candidate_eligible

columns.description: Always false. A history review cannot create a predecessor/successor transition.
columns.name: transition_candidate_eligible

columns.description: Always false. Exact observed runs are not effective provider override intervals.
columns.name: exact_override_interval_eligible

columns.description: Always false. The review-only output cannot authorize S7 Full materialization.
columns.name: full_run_eligible

columns.description: Always false. The review-only output cannot be published.
columns.name: publication_eligible

description: Review-only S7 table containing one row for each full-S4-release session with Asset evidence matching one of three exact provider, market, locale, ticker, and observed Composite FIGI groups. It preserves every matching source version, selected universe-parent reconciliation, and exact XNYS-adjacent observed runs while forbidding Share Class filtering, interval inference, canonicalization, adjudication, transition, tradability decisions, Full, and publication.
grain: One row for one review_group_id and XNYS session_date with at least one exact-group asset_observation_daily source row in the full S4 release; no row is synthesized for a session without exact-group Asset evidence.

qa_rules.description: Output field order, Arrow types, nullability, and JSON-string fields must exactly match this review-only contract.
Scope must be exactly massive/stocks/us SOR+BBG000KMY6N2, XZO+BBG01XL8FHT0, and ANABV+BBG021DMXXT2 over the full frozen S4 release.
The exact inventory candidate/completion and directional preview candidate/completion bindings must validate before any scan.
The exact full S4 release set, two table releases, 2016-07-11 through 2026-07-09 XNYS calendar, and immutable source pins must validate.
All 5,026 full-release daily source artifacts must match path, SHA-256, bytes, rows, contract, and Arrow schema.
Physical artifact, row, and byte scan totals must equal the complete bound S4 release, independent of bounded logical output counts.
No retained Asset row or output slot may fall outside the three exact provider/market/locale/ticker/Composite groups.
Every Asset source version matching an exact group anywhere in the full S4 release must be retained and attested.
Every emitted slot must contain at least one exact-group Asset attestation and counts must equal the evidence manifest.
Share Class FIGI must never participate in source selection, scope membership, version retention, or run segmentation.
Each same-ticker/session universe lookup may match at most one universe_source_daily row.
Every present universe membership must resolve selected_source_record_id to exactly one same-ticker/session Asset parent, even if it has another Composite.
No present universe membership may resolve selected_source_record_id to more than one Asset parent.
Every present universe row and selected Asset parent must reproduce the frozen S4 projection and keep their availability timelines distinct.
Every retained source row must use ProviderRowAttestation schema version 2 with a full contracted snapshot and physical locator.
Every attestation must replay from its exact release, artifact, row group, and row index without mutation.
Evidence may not omit a used attestation, retain an unused attestation, duplicate an ID, or reuse a physical locator.
Composite, Share Class, CIK, market, locale, MIC, type, activity, membership, and lineage must equal the source snapshots.
Runs must be maximal sequences of exact-group observed sessions adjacent on the frozen XNYS calendar and must break across every gap.
Run IDs, ordinals, endpoints, counts, previous-session fields, and group summaries must exactly reconcile to retained observed sessions.
Identity quality must not synthesize, delete, activate, deactivate, or relabel source membership.
No identity-quality finding may emit or imply a forced-liquidation signal.
Every row must remain exact_full_release_observed_runs_only; evidence endpoints cannot become effective override dates.
No effective_from, effective_to, validity range, or extrapolated boundary may be generated from exact observed runs.
The review must not load, match, rank, prioritize, or apply any Composite, Share Class, or transition registry.
No canonical Composite, canonical Share Class, asset ID, issuer ID, override target, or equivalent identity result may appear.
No disposition, adjudication, provider override, Share Class correction, or asset transition decision may be emitted.
No final or intermediate tradability eligibility, strategy-pool inclusion, entitlement decision, or liquidation decision may be emitted.
Every row-level adjudication, canonical, transition, override-interval, Full, and publication capability marker must be false.
No review_group_id and session_date primary key may be duplicated.
Rows must be sorted by ticker and session_date, with run ordinals reproducing the frozen XNYS segmentation.
Candidate, data, QA, sequence, evidence, bounded examples, and completion artifacts must pass exact immutable readback.
Execution must fail closed before candidate commit if any approved artifact, row, byte, wall-time, memory, disk, temporary, or output cap is exceeded.
Exact-group Asset versions not selected by the universe parent remain visible with reason counts and bounded examples.
Sessions with exact-group Asset evidence but no universe membership remain evidence-only and require review.
Sessions whose unique selected universe parent uses another Composite remain reconciled evidence and require review.
Same-session exact-group versions with different Share Class, CIK, MIC, type, or active values remain separate evidence.
Changes in the exact-group observed Share Class value sets between adjacent observed sessions are reported for review.
Changes in exact-group observed CIK value sets between adjacent observed sessions are reported for review.
Changes in exact-group observed primary exchange MIC value sets between adjacent observed sessions are reported for review.
Changes in exact-group observed type-code value sets between adjacent observed sessions are reported for review.
Changes in provider or universe active state between adjacent observed sessions are reported without deciding tradability.
Every nonadjacent pair of observed sessions is reported as an exact run break with bounded edge examples.
Groups containing more than one maximal exact observed run are reported with run counts and boundaries.
Groups observed on the first or last session of the frozen release are reported because an observed endpoint is release-censored.
